headline: Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) Screens as a Strong Minervini Trend Template and High Growth Momentum Candidate
summary: Hasbro (HAS) passes Mark Minervini’s Trend Template with a clear uptrend and strong fundamentals, showing 228% earnings growth and rising revenue for high growth momentum.
